heroHeadline: Thousands Pray at Al-Aqsa as Israel Lifts 40-Day Access Ban
heroSubtitle: Thousands of Palestinians returned to Al-Aqsa Mosque on April 9, 2026 after Israeli authorities lifted a 40-day ban on Muslim worshippers' access to Islam's third holiest site. The lifting of restrictions marks a significant development in Israeli policy at the contested Jerusalem compound, which has historically been a flashpoint in the broader conflict.
footerNote: Data sourced from UN OCHA, IDF, Gaza Ministry of Health, B'Tselem, ICC, ICJ, Reuters, Al Jazeera, OHCHR, UNRWA, Yesh Din, Human Rights Watch, and institutional analyses. Casualty figures are subject to ongoing verification. The conflict has persisted since Israeli independence on May 14, 1948.
